decisions.title: Durable Identity Strategy
decisions.remaining_work: Implement and verify durable identity behavior.

decisions.title: Canonical Semantic Serialization
decisions.remaining_work: Implement adapters and cross-language RFC 8785 conformance tests.

decisions.title: Content Region Anchoring
decisions.remaining_work: Decide stable anchoring across edits, movement, splitting, merging, and conflicting revisions.

decisions.title: Relationship Persistence and Lifecycle
decisions.remaining_work: Decide persistence and lifecycle semantics for asserted, continuing, effective-dated, immutable, derived, corrected, superseded, withdrawn, and restricted Relationships.

decisions.title: Backlink and Reverse-Dependency Indexing
decisions.remaining_work: Decide reverse indexing, refresh, authorization, audit, and inference-leakage behavior.
